mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of Joseph C. Dickerson
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of Joseph C. Dickerson William B. Dickerson, Administrator Recorded in Ledger Book ?, page ?, in the Floyd County Courthouse. By Pedigo Date recorded as July 5th, 1899 term
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
